title: Add secondary model distillation step to web_fetch (parity with CC applyPromptToMarkdown)
description:
Gap discovered during spec #529: CC web_fetch applies a secondary Haiku model call (utils.ts:484-530, applyPromptToMarkdown) to distill raw page content against the user's prompt. The tool input has two fields: url and prompt. The result field in the output is the model's answer, not the raw page text.

OC execute_web_fetch (src/tools/web.rs:9-59) accepts only url; there is no prompt parameter. The tool returns raw Jina Reader markdown. The agent must process the full text itself.

Done when: web_fetch accepts a prompt parameter; fetched markdown is passed to a secondary model (configurable, defaulting to the small-fast model) with the prompt; the result field returns the model's distilled answer. Raw page text capped at CC's MAX_MARKDOWN_LENGTH (100,000 chars) before sending to secondary model.

Parent spec: #529
